records.ety: [L. constantia: cf. F. constance. See Constant.]

defs: The state or quality of being constant or steadfast; freedom from change; stability; fixedness; immutability; as, the constancy of God in his nature and attributes.
Fixedness or firmness of mind; persevering resolution; especially, firmness of mind under sufferings, steadiness in attachments, or perseverance in enterprise; stability; fidelity.
quotes: A fellow of plain uncoined constancy.
